overview.what: A production-grade scraping pipeline designed for recurring large-scale data collection. It features automatic scheduling via Cron, deduplication to avoid rescraping known URLs, and structured storage in a relational database.
overview.how_it_works: The pipeline uses Scrapy for efficient multi-threaded crawling. Scrapy-Redis ensures that crawled URLs are persisted in Redis allowing for resumeable jobs. Extracted items are passed through a custom pipeline that saves them to PostgreSQL, and the entire process is triggered by a periodic Cron job.
what_you_learn: Writing data pipelines for SQL storage

files.description: Scrapy spider with custom item fields.
